name: Rapid-MLX
description: The fastest local AI engine for Apple Silicon. 4.2x faster than Ollama, 0.08s cached TTFT, 100% tool calling. 17 tool parsers, prompt cache, reasoning separation, cloud routing. Drop-in OpenAI replacement. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Aider.
summaryZh: The fastest local AI engine for Apple Silicon. 4.2x faster than Ollama, 0.08s cached TTFT, 100% tool calling. 17 tool parsers, prompt cache, reasoning separation, cloud routing. Drop-in OpenAI replacement. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Aider. 它主要面向代码场景，适合做 AI 编程助手、代码生成或自动修复。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
